creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
http://acadix.biz/diskimage-tools.php is light on detail so maybe add a pkg-message hinting at: 

man img2dev

man mount_image

man umount_image

Thanks

----

root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # pkg query %Fp diskimage-tools
/usr/local/man/man1/img2dev.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/mount_image.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/umount_image.1.gz
/usr/local/sbin/img2dev
/usr/local/sbin/mount_image
/usr/local/sbin/umount_image
/usr/local/share/licenses/diskimage-tools-0.2/BSD2CLAUSE
/usr/local/share/licenses/diskimage-tools-0.2/LICENSE
/usr/local/share/licenses/diskimage-tools-0.2/catalog.mk
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ #
